section.heading: Short title

content.p: This part may be cited as the “Rural Education Achievement Program”.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–10, title V, § 5201, formerly title VI, § 6201, as added Pub. L. 107–110, title VI, § 601, Jan. 8, 2002, 115 Stat. 1891; renumbered title V, § 5201, Pub. L. 114–95, title V, § 5001(a)(2), Dec. 10, 2015, 129 Stat. 2039, 2040.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 5201 of Pub. L. 89–10 was renumbered section 4301 and was classified to section 7221 of this title, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 114–95.
Another prior section 5201 of Pub. L. 89–10 was classified to section 7231 of this title, prior to the general amendment of former subchapter V of this chapter by Pub. L. 107–110.
